name: Baseline-003: length-only heuristic (anchors the floor)
description: A deliberately bad heuristic that predicts class from question length alone. Exists to anchor the bottom of the leaderboard with a real numeric row, not a hypothetical 'trivial baseline' footer. Notably gets K3=0.56 from high recall (0.80) on curated folklore (short items) and terrible precision; accuracy 0.26 below the majority baseline (0.51). No training, no model.
